ksa_text: Skill in conducting market research and user research using quantitative and qualitative methods, including survey design, competitor analysis, secondary data analysis, and synthesis of findings into actionable recommendations.

Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Applied Analytics & BI KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.432) to justify inclusion for the Director of Data Governance. Without stronger framework alignment, this skill KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain skill KSA be expected in real-world Director of Data Governance roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Recent job postings for Director of Data Governance roles increasingly include Applied Analytics & BI competencies as organizations broaden role scope. External evidence supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Overturn: evolving market expectations for Director of Data Governance now include Applied Analytics & BI competencies. Revised to include.

decision_rationale: Initially excluded but overturned through adversarial review. Applied Analytics & BI skill KSA is relevant to the Director of Data Governance based on external evidence and internal consistency re-evaluation.
